# Small Cube

A simple 10×10×10 unit cube centered at the origin.

## Parameters

- **size**: Controls the dimensions of the cube. All three axes (width, height, depth) use the same value for a perfect cube.

## Customization

You can adjust the `size` parameter to make the cube larger or smaller. The cube is centered at the origin, making it easy to combine with other shapes.

## 3D Printing

This model is print-ready with no overhangs or support requirements. The small size makes it suitable for testing your 3D printer settings or as a building block for more complex designs.
